'''Zelmaadine''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moonless]] [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that occupied the first [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position around the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Velm]]. It was located in the [[Velm system]],<ref name="Velmor Part 1" /> a part of the [[Halori sector/Legends|Halori sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="Velmor Part 1" />

==Behind the scenes==
Zelmaadine was mentioned in ''[[Velmor: Royalty and Rebellion]]'', a [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] supplement written by [[Cory J. Herndon]] and published on [[Wizards.com]] on [[March 6]], [[2003]] for use with [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Velmor Part 1" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' later placed the Velm [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Zelmaadine, in grid square P-7.<ref name="TEA" />
